summary.headline: Driven Full Stack Architect
summary.body: Passionate about building scalable web applications and leading high-performance engineering teams. I specialize in bridging the gap between complex backend systems and intuitive, modern user experiences.

featuredEco.title: Eco-Track Dashboard
featuredEco.description: SaaS platform tracking carbon footprints. Built with Next.js and D3.js.

featuredSecure.title: SecurePay API
featuredSecure.description: High-throughput payment gateway processing 10k+ req/sec. Node.js & Redis.

projects.title: Hyper-Comm Platform
projects.description: Distributed messaging with real-time sync across regions. Kafka and custom WebSockets for low latency.
